primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes minimum staffing requirements and qualifications for dialysis facilities

primary_sources.name: ANNA Core Curriculum for Nephrology Nursing
primary_sources.relevance: Defines competency standards and training requirements for nephrology nursing staff

primary_sources.name: AAKP Dialysis Facility Compare Database
primary_sources.relevance: Provides staffing ratio benchmarks and quality metrics for dialysis facilities

primary_sources.name: MGMA Physician Compensation and Production Survey
primary_sources.relevance: Offers nephrology-specific compensation benchmarking data for physicians and APPs

secondary_sources.name: Joint Commission Standards for Ambulatory Health Care
secondary_sources.relevance: Provides human resources and staffing standards for accredited healthcare facilities

gaps: Limited recent research on optimal physician-to-patient ratios in outpatient nephrology
Insufficient data on retention strategies specific to dialysis technicians
Lack of standardized competency frameworks for nephrology advanced practice providers
